zh.Great Harwood, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾格亞特 哈伍德
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton於大約1060年出生。他於1080年之前與Unknown在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Great Harwood, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾格亞特 哈伍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton于大约1060年出生。他于1080年之前与Unknown在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton was born about 1060. He married Unknown before 1080, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton est né environ 1060. Il a épousé Unknown avant 1080, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton wurde um 1060 geboren. Er hat vor 1080 in England Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton è nato il circa 1060. Lui sposato Unknown prima del 1080, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Great Harwood, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアグレアト ハーウッド
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Fittonは約1060年に生まれた。1080年以前にイギリスでUnknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton(은)는 대략 1060년 태어났다. 그는 1080년 이전 영국에서 Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1060. Ele casou-se com Unknown antes 1080, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton родился около 1060 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown перед 1080 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Fitton nació aproximadamente 1060. Se casó con Unknown antes de 1080, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
